compositional_deconstruction.background: Full-bleed architectural photograph of a sleek contemporary home filling the entire 16:9 frame, slightly desaturated editorial grade with cool-neutral white balance under soft overcast daylight. The house shows clean horizontal lines, floor-to-ceiling glass panels, a warm wood-clad facade in honey-brown tones, and a minimalist landscaped front yard with a single sculptural tree. No warm cast on the facade; the palette reads cool-neutral with warm brown accents from the wood cladding.

elements.desc: Charcoal-black semi-transparent panel anchored along the left third of the frame, roughly 85% opacity so the architecture reads faintly through it. Solid rectangular block spanning full frame height, edge-to-edge along the left side.
Thin antique-gold hairline rule running horizontally across the charcoal panel, separating the headline block above from the address and agent details below. Single-pixel weight, muted gold #B8924A.
Small solid antique-gold square accent mark beside the agent name at the bottom-left of the charcoal panel, acting as a brand flourish. Muted gold #B8924A.

Off-white rectangular card anchored in the lower-right corner of the frame, solid warm off-white #F2EDE4 with a subtle soft drop shadow lifting it off the photograph behind. Holds the price and bed/bath specs.

Large stacked headline across the upper portion of the charcoal panel, set in an elegant high-contrast Didone-style serif in muted antique gold #B8924A. Tightly tracked caps, three lines, left-aligned, horizontal.
Medium-sized address text beneath the gold hairline rule on the charcoal panel. Clean geometric sans-serif in warm off-white, tracked caps, regular weight, left-aligned, horizontal.
Small agent name at the bottom-left of the charcoal panel, to the right of the gold square accent mark. Geometric sans-serif in pure white, tracked caps, regular weight, left-aligned, horizontal.
Smaller broker name directly beneath the agent name. Geometric sans-serif in muted antique gold #B8924A, tightly tracked caps, light weight, left-aligned, horizontal.
Oversized price numerals centered on the off-white card. Heavy charcoal serif in deep charcoal #1A1A1A, large display size dominating the card, horizontal, centered.
Small bed and bath specs beneath the price on the off-white card. Tracked geometric sans-serif caps in charcoal #1A1A1A, separated by a thin antique-gold vertical pipe, horizontal, centered.

high_level_description: A modern luxury real estate listing infographic with editorial typography overlaid on a hero photograph of a sleek contemporary home, featuring a charcoal left-third panel with gold serif headline and an off-white lower-right price card.
